ground_truth.title: Rayon
ground_truth.main_content: Rayon is an effortless CAD software powered by AI, designed specifically for interior designers and architects. The platform enables AI-powered drawing with features focused on precision, stunning visualizations, faster workflows, and collaboration. Call-to-action buttons encourage users to book a demo or try the software for free. The homepage showcases a video demo and displays customer logos from companies like AV Partners, Morning, Goldbeck, Coloc, Flexas, Numa, Plandent, Edgar Suites, Workwell, Kestrel, Identites, Jarret Yoshida, and Live Light.
